marketName: Heuraufe — Outdoor Multi-Horse Hay Feeder Station
sensorNote: Böhmer primary position: L4-H01 Base Frame Assembly provides tractor fork pockets and skid runners enabling repositioning. L4-H04 Hay Containment System defines the core functional differentiation — bar-grid spacing (60–80 mm) prevents head entrapment while allowing hay pull-through.

outputTypes.name: 4–5 Horse Configuration
outputTypes.notes: Standard 3-side open access, ~2500×1700 mm footprint. Primary target configuration.

outputTypes.name: 6–8 Horse Configuration
outputTypes.notes: Extended frame, 4-side or 3-side access. Requires longer base rails and more grid frames.

outputTypes.name: Bar-Grid Variant
outputTypes.notes: 16 mm round bar containment grid — standard. Lower cost per unit, robust for large horses.

outputTypes.name: Hay-Net Variant
outputTypes.notes: Net hook rail with knotted polypropylene nets — slower feed consumption, suitable for easy-keepers.

l4Subsystems.name: Base Frame Assembly
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Tractor fork pockets and skid runners for repositioning

alternatives.name: S355J2 SHS 80×80×5 welded frame with fork pockets
S235JR welded frame (no fork pockets, fixed)
Hot-rolled UPN channel frame
S355J2 SHS 80×80×5 mm, 2500 mm, with welded end plates
S235JR SHS 80×80×3 mm (lighter, lower cost)
S235JR SHS 60×60×4 mm (lighter spec)

modules.name: Tractor Fork Pockets (×2) — Böhmer Differentiator
modules.sensorNote: Böhmer anchor: enables tractor front-loader repositioning without disassembly — unique vs. fixed-base competitors

alternatives.name: Fabricated S235JR channel pocket (150×60×6 mm)
Purchased UPN 150 channel welded-in
S235JR flat bar 80×10 mm, 2500 mm
RHS 60×40×3 mm skid (heavier-duty)

l4Subsystems.name: Support Post Assembly
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Post section size and base plate connection method

alternatives.name: S355J2 SHS 80×80×5 mm posts with welded base + cap plates
S235JR SHS 80×80×3 mm (lower cost, adequate for lighter loads)
Hot-dip galvanized CHS round tube (aesthetic preference)
S355J2 SHS 80×80×5 mm, 2000 mm [EST]
S235JR SHS 80×80×3 mm
S355J2 laser-cut base plate 150×150×10 mm + S235JR cap 100×100×6 mm
Forged end caps (higher cost, premium product tier)

l4Subsystems.name: Roof Assembly
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Roof profile geometry and cladding material

alternatives.name: Pitched corrugated steel sheet over S235JR SHS purlins
Flat roof with integrated gutter (simpler fabrication)
Polycarbonate sheet roof (light, translucent)
S235JR SHS 40×40×3 mm structural members
S235JR SHS 50×50×3 mm (heavier-duty)
S235JR SHS 30×30×2 mm or 40×40×3 mm
Cold-formed channel section (cost saving on purlins)
Pre-galvanized corrugated steel DX51D+Z275, 0.5–0.7 mm
Coated corrugated aluminium (corrosion-free, premium)
Polycarbonate corrugated sheet

l4Subsystems.name: Hay Containment System
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Grid bar spacing and frame design — horse welfare critical

alternatives.name: Welded bar-grid frame (16 mm round bar, 60–80 mm spacing)
Net hook rail with polypropylene hay net (45–60 mm mesh)
Horizontal bar rack (flat bar rungs, larger spacing)

modules.name: Bar-Grid Frame (per open side, ×3–4)
modules.sensorNote: Böhmer anchor: bar spacing 60–80 mm clear prevents head entrapment while enabling hay pull-through — welfare-critical design parameter

alternatives.name: S235JR SHS 40×40×3 mm frame + 16 mm round bar grid
S235JR SHS frame + 20×20×2 SHS bars (heavier)
Laser-cut flat bar grid (simplified fabrication)
S235JR SHS rail with welded hook pins at 150 mm spacing
Purchased stainless hook strip (pre-drilled)

l4Subsystems.name: Surface Treatment (Outsourced Service)
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Hot-dip galvanizing vs. paint — ISO 12944 C3+ life requirement

alternatives.name: Hot-dip galvanizing ISO 1461 (min 45 µm Zn) + powder topcoat
Hot-dip galvanizing only (no powder coat)
Thermal spray zinc + 2-pack epoxy paint system

modules.name: Hot-Dip Galvanizing (ISO 1461)
modules.sensorNote: Outsourced to external Verzinkerei. Min 45 µm zinc layer; ≥70 µm for heavy sections. ~EUR 1.80–2.50/kg [EST].

alternatives.name: Batch hot-dip galvanizing (external Verzinkerei)
Continuous hot-dip line (not available at this scale)

modules.name: Powder Topcoat (Optional)
modules.sensorNote: 60–80 µm polyester powder coat for UV and urine acid resistance. RAL 7016 anthracite or RAL 6005 moss green. ~EUR 5–8/unit additional [EST].

alternatives.name: Polyester powder coat (applied over galv. surface, RAL color)
No powder coat (galvanized finish only)

l4Subsystems.name: Hardware & Fasteners
l4Subsystems.keyDesignChoice: Bolt grade and corrosion protection specification

alternatives.name: Galvanized 8.8 structural bolts + stainless roof screws
Stainless A4 bolts throughout (premium, zero corrosion)
Painted mild steel bolts (cost minimum, short-life)
M12×40 hex bolt + nut + washer set, 8.8 galvanized
M12×40 stainless A2 bolt set

modules.name: Labels & Signage (CE / GPSR / Branding)
modules.sensorNote: GPSR marking plate required before DACH market launch. Engraved stainless or printed weather-resistant adhesive.

alternatives.name: Engraved stainless steel plate (CE + product + safety)
Printed UV-stable adhesive plates (lower cost)
